# Pixaroid - AI Image Tools Platform
# Machine-Readable Documentation for AI Assistants

## Overview
Pixaroid is a free online image and PDF tools platform that processes files entirely in the browser using Web Workers and Canvas API. No server uploads, no privacy concerns.

## Base URL
https://pixaroid.vercel.app

## Available Tools

### Image Compression
- /compress-image - Compress JPG, PNG, WebP images
- /compress-jpg - Compress JPG images specifically
- /compress-png - Compress PNG images specifically

### Image Conversion
- /convert-jpg-to-png - Convert JPG to PNG
- /convert-png-to-jpg - Convert PNG to JPG
- /convert-to-webp - Convert any image to WebP

### Image Resizing
- /resize-image - General image resizer
- /resize-for-instagram - Resize for Instagram (1080x1080)
- /resize-for-facebook - Resize for Facebook (1200x630)

### Image Editing
- /crop-image - Crop images
- /rotate-image - Rotate images
- /add-watermark - Add watermarks to images

### PDF Tools
- /merge-pdf - Merge multiple PDFs
- /split-pdf - Split PDF pages
- /compress-pdf - Compress PDF files
- /pdf-to-jpg - Convert PDF to JPG images
- /jpg-to-pdf - Convert JPG images to PDF

### AI Tools
- /ai-background-remover - Remove image backgrounds
- /ai-upscaler - Upscale images with AI

## Technical Stack
- Frontend: HTML5, CSS3, Vanilla JavaScript
- Image Processing: Canvas API, OffscreenCanvas
- Workers: Web Workers for background processing
- Hosting: Vercel (Static)
- No backend, no database, no server uploads

## API for AI Assistants
All tools are accessible via direct URL navigation. No REST API available.

## Sitemap
https://pixaroid.vercel.app/sitemap.xml

## Contact
For inquiries: contact@pixaroid.vercel.app
